songs.title: Bobby Sox
feed: “Bobby Sox” by Green Day reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Bobby Sox” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 6 spots to #1.
“Bobby Sox” by Green Day climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 6 spots to #1.
“Bobby Sox” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 102 sales units.
“Bobby Sox” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 170 streams units.
“Bobby Sox” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 367,290 total units.
